title: Earnings call transcript: Cronos Group Q4 2024 sees revenue growth, stock up premarket
text: Cronos Group Q4 2024 earnings call transcript from Investing.com. The company reported strong 2024 results with 35% year-over-year revenue growth to $117.6 million. Q4 consolidated net revenue reached $30.3 million, up 27% annually. The company nearly doubled adjusted gross margins to 26%. Operating expenses were reduced by $5 million. Cash and cash equivalents reached $859 million. Free cash flow turned positive at $5.7 million for 2024 from negative $46.3 million in 2023. Spinach became number one cannabis brand in Canada by market share. SOURZ gummy line captured 23% market share in Q4 edibles. GrowCo expansion construction on track for Q2 2025 completion. Israel operations achieved record quarterly volumes. International expansion into Germany and UK markets showed promising growth. Stock moved up in premarket trading ahead of earnings announcement.
